title: koeleria oreophila subsp. oreophila
intro: Koeleria oreophila subsp. oreophila is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly found in high-altitude regions. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Koeleria oreophila subsp. oreophila is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
